repos.name: early-20th-century-warming
repos.description: Attribution of early 20th century (1900-1945) warming with FaIR — code and data for the Climate Brink post

repos.name: climate-dashboard
repos.description: Interactive global temperature dashboard using ERA5 data with ML-powered projections

repos.name: warming-map
repos.description: Interactive map of 175 years of temperature change, built on Berkeley Earth gridded data

repos.name: biomass_map
repos.description: Interactive BiCRS/BECCS feedstock, CO2 storage & best-use-of-biomass map (Frontier strategy tool)

repos.name: land_ocean_ensembles
repos.description: 10,000-member annual ensembles of global land (LSAT) and ocean (SST) temperature, 1850-2025, built from 5 LSAT + 4 SST products via a Thorne et al. (2026) style family-tree weighting.
